<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tài</rt></ruby><ruby>初<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>与<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>同<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>万<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wàn</rt></ruby><ruby>物<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>藉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>；<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fán</rt></ruby><ruby>被<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>没<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">méi</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>藉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>头<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tou</rt></ruby>，<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Guānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>黑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hēi</rt></ruby><ruby>暗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby>，<ruby>黑<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hēi</rt></ruby><ruby>暗<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">àn</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>差<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chāi</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hàn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>可<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kě</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>照<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhào</rt></ruby><ruby>亮<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>切<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qiè</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby>，<ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>藉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>造<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zào</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>世<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>界<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiè</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">què</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>识<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby>，<ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>倒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>接<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiē</rt></ruby><ruby>待<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>名<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>权<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>柄<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>女<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǚ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>等<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">děnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>血<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xuè</rt></ruby><ruby>气<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qì</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>情<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">qínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>欲<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yì</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Dào</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">le</rt></ruby><ruby>肉<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ròu</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>住<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhù</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>间<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>充<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>充<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>满<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>恩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ēn</rt></ruby><ruby>典<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">diǎn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lǐ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>过<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuò</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>独<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dú</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>荣<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>。<ruby>施<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">shī</rt></ruby><ruby>洗<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">xǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">de</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>

<ruby>约<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yuē</rt></ruby><ruby>翰<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hàn</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>证<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>喊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>曾<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>，‘<ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nà</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>反<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>成<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>本<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">běn</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>前<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qián</rt></ruby>。’”

神Shén爱ài世shì人rén，甚shèn至zhì将jiānɡ他tā的de独dú生shēnɡ子zǐ赐cì给ɡěi他tā们men，叫jiào一yí切qiè信xìn他tā的de，不bú至zhì灭miè亡wánɡ，反fǎn得dé永yǒnɡ生shēnɡ。

光Guānɡ来lái到dào世shì间jiān，世shì人rén因yīn自zì己jǐ的de行xínɡ为wéi是shì恶è的de，不bù爱ài光ɡuānɡ倒dào爱ài黑hēi暗àn，定dìnɡ他tā们men的de罪zuì就jiù是shì在zài此cǐ。

<ruby>凡<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Fán</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>恶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">è</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>恨<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hèn</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>光<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡuānɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>恐<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kǒnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>怕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pà</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">de</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wéi</rt></ruby><ruby>受<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shòu</rt></ruby><ruby>责<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zé</rt></ruby><ruby>备<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bèi</rt></ruby>；

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>便<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">biàn</rt></ruby><ruby>知<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhī</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dɑo</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>正<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhènɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>对<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">duì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>”<ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>时<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>候<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hou</rt></ruby>；<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>和<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>全<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">quán</rt></ruby><ruby>家<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>都<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dōu</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>加<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Jiā</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>第<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>二<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">èr</rt></ruby><ruby>件<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>迹<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby>，<ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>犹<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yóu</rt></ruby><ruby>太<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tài</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qu</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>。
这Zhè事shì以yǐ后hòu，到dào了le犹Yóu太tài人rén的de一yí个ɡè节jié期qī，耶Yē稣sū就jiù上shànɡ耶Yē路lù撒sā冷lěnɡ去qù。

<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zài</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>路<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lù</rt></ruby><ruby>撒<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">sā</rt></ruby><ruby>冷<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lěnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>靠<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">kào</rt></ruby><ruby>近<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jìn</rt></ruby><ruby>羊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>池<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">chí</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>希<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>作<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zuò</rt></ruby><ruby>毕<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Bì</rt></ruby><ruby>士<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby>，<ruby>旁<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">pánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>边<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">biān</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>五<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>廊<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">lánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zi</rt></ruby>。

“<ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">Zài</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">li</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>孩<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>童<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tónɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>带<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dài</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>五<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">wǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>个<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡè</rt></ruby><ruby>大<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">dà</rt></ruby><ruby>麦<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">mài</rt></ruby><ruby>饼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">bǐnɡ</rt></ruby>、<ruby>两<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">liǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>条<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">tiáo</rt></ruby><ruby>鱼<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">yú</rt></ruby>，<ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>分<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>这<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">zhè</rt></ruby><ruby>许<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">xǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>多<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">duō</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>还<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">hái</rt></ruby><ruby>算<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">suàn</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">me</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-3">ne</rt></ruby>？”

<ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rú</rt></ruby><ruby>经<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>‘<ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby><ruby>腹<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>中<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhōnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>流<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">liú</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>活<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huó</rt></ruby><ruby>水<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>江<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>河<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hé</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby>’。”

<ruby>于<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>着<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhe</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>纷<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēn</rt></ruby><ruby>争<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhēnɡ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>罕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎn</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>罕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>儿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ér</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>必<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bì</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yà</rt></ruby><ruby>伯<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bó</rt></ruby><ruby>拉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lā</rt></ruby><ruby>罕<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hǎn</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>行<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>事<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>从<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>淫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yín</rt></ruby><ruby>乱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">luàn</rt></ruby><ruby>生<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>只<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yí</rt></ruby><ruby>位<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>父<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby>。”
耶Yē稣sū说shuō：“倘Tǎnɡ若ruò神Shén是shì你nǐ们men的de父fù，你nǐ们men就jiù必bì爱ài我wǒ；因yīn为wèi我wǒ本běn是shì出chū于yú神Shén，也yě是shì从cónɡ神Shén而ér来lái，并bìnɡ不bú是shì由yóu着zhe自zì己jǐ来lái，乃nǎi是shì他tā差chāi我wǒ来lái。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>明<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mínɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>白<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>话<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huà</rt></ruby><ruby>呢<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ne</rt></ruby>？<ruby>无<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wú</rt></ruby><ruby>非<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fēi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>道<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dào</rt></ruby>。

你Nǐ们men是shì出chū于yú你nǐ们men的de父fù魔mó鬼ɡuǐ，你nǐ们men父fù的de私sī欲yù，你nǐ们men偏piān要yào行xínɡ。他Tā从cónɡ起qǐ初chū是shì杀shā人rén的de，不bù守shǒu真zhēn理lǐ，因yīn他tā心xīn里li没méi有yǒu真zhēn理lǐ。他Tā说shuō谎huǎnɡ是shì出chū于yú自zì己jǐ，因yīn他tā本běn来lái是shì说shuō谎huǎnɡ的de，也yě是shì说shuō谎huǎnɡ之zhī人rén的de父fù。

“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>将<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>真<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhēn</rt></ruby><ruby>理<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>告<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>诉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">su</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>马<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Mǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>利<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lì</rt></ruby><ruby>亚<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yà</rt></ruby><ruby>听<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">tīnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>见<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiɑn</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">le</rt></ruby>，<ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>急<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">jí</rt></ruby><ruby>忙<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">mánɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>起<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">lɑi</rt></ruby>，<ruby>到<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dào</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>那<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nà</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">qù</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Tā</rt></ruby><ruby>既<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jì</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>如<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Rú</rt></ruby><ruby>今<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jīn</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>荣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耀<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby>，<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>身<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shēn</rt></ruby><ruby>上<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shɑnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby><ruby>荣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耀<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Shén</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>自<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zì</rt></ruby><ruby>己<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>荣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耀<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>子<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zǐ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>并<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>且<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qiě</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>快<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">kuài</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>荣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rónɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>耀<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>他<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tā</rt></ruby>。

小Xiǎo子zi们men，我wǒ还hái有yǒu不bù多duō的de时shí候hou与yǔ你nǐ们men同tónɡ在zài；后hòu来lái你nǐ们men要yào找zhǎo我wǒ，但dàn我wǒ所suǒ去qù的de地dì方fɑnɡ你nǐ们men不bù能nénɡ到dào。这Zhè话huà我wǒ曾cénɡ对duì犹yóu太tài人rén说shuō过ɡuò，如rú今jīn也yě照zhào样yànɡ对duì你nǐ们men说shuō。

<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>赐<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>给<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡěi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>一<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yī</rt></ruby><ruby>条<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tiáo</rt></ruby><ruby>新<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>令<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lìnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>乃<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎi</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby>；<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>怎<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zěn</rt></ruby><ruby>样<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yànɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby>。

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>若<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ruò</rt></ruby><ruby>有<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǒu</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>相<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>爱<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ài</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xīn</rt></ruby>，<ruby>众<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zhònɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>人<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rén</rt></ruby><ruby>因<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yīn</rt></ruby><ruby>此<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>就<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiù</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>出<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">chū</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">men</rt></ruby><ruby>是<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shì</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>徒<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">tú</rt></ruby><ruby>了<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">le</rt></ruby>。”<ruby>预<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">yù</rt></ruby><ruby>言<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">yán</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-2">zhǔ</rt></ruby>

<ruby>西<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Xī</rt></ruby><ruby>门<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mén</rt></ruby><ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>问<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèn</rt></ruby><ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>往<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǎnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>哪<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǎ</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">li</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>？”<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>回<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">huí</rt></ruby><ruby>答<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dá</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>所<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">suǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby><ruby>的<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dì</rt></ruby><ruby>方<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">fɑnɡ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>跟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>，<ruby>后<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">hòu</rt></ruby><ruby>来<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">lái</rt></ruby><ruby>却<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">què</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>跟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>彼<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Bǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>得<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">dé</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>主<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Zhǔ</rt></ruby><ruby>啊<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɑ</rt></ruby>，<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>什<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shén</rt></ruby><ruby>么<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">me</rt></ruby><ruby>现<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiàn</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bù</rt></ruby><ruby>能<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nénɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>跟<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡēn</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>去<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">qù</rt></ruby>？<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>舍<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shě</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>耶<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Yē</rt></ruby><ruby>稣<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sū</rt></ruby><ruby>说<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shuō</rt></ruby>：“<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>愿<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yuàn</rt></ruby><ruby>意<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yi</rt></ruby><ruby>为<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wèi</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>舍<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shě</rt></ruby><ruby>命<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mìnɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>吗<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">mɑ</rt></ruby>？<ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">Wǒ</rt></ruby><ruby>实<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>实<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">shí</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zɑi</rt></ruby><ruby>在<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">zài</rt></ruby><ruby>地<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">de</rt></ruby><ruby>告<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">ɡào</rt></ruby><ruby>诉<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">su</rt></ruby><ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby>：<ruby>鸡<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jī</rt></ruby><ruby>叫<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">jiào</rt></ruby><ruby>以<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>先<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">xiān</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>三<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">sān</rt></ruby><ruby>次<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">cì</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>认<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">rèn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-4">wǒ</rt></ruby>。”

<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>心<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xīn</rt></ruby><ruby>里<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">li</rt></ruby><ruby>不<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">bú</rt></ruby><ruby>要<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yào</rt></ruby><ruby>忧<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yōu</rt></ruby><ruby>愁<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">chóu</rt></ruby>，<ruby>你<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">nǐ</rt></ruby><ruby>们<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">men</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>神<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">Shén</rt></ruby>，<ruby>也<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">yě</rt></ruby><ruby>当<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">dānɡ</rt></ruby><ruby>信<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">xìn</rt></ruby><ruby>我<rt class="_idGenRuby-5">wǒ</rt></ruby>。
